meanings.definition: problem solving that involves numbers or quantities
a bill for an amount due
the act of counting; reciting numbers in ascending order
examples: the counting continued for several hours
I imagine she earned a lot of money with her new novel
I thought to find her in a bad state
he didn't think to find her in the kitchen
I guess she is angry at me for standing her up
She views this quite differently from me
I consider her to be shallow
I don't see the situation quite as negatively as you do

meanings.definition: make a mathematical calculation or computation

examples: you can count on me to help you any time
Look to your friends for support
Depend on your family in times of crisis
You have to reckon with our opponents
